query.title: Search Query
query.description: Google Maps search query, e.g. 'dentist New York'

geoTiles.title: Geo Tiles (optional)
geoTiles.description: List of queries to run separately, e.g. ['dentist Manhattan', 'dentist Brooklyn']

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of listings to return

includeSocial.title: Include Social Media Scraping
includeSocial.description: Scrape Instagram/Facebook for email if that is the listed website. Costs extra proxy bandwidth.
